qa_pairs.question: After selecting files or directories, how do you initiate a transfer within the Globus interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To initiate a transfer after selecting the desired files or directories, you must click on one of the large blue buttons featuring white arrowheads. The transfer job will then be given a unique ID and commence immediately.

qa_pairs.question: How can users monitor the progress of their file transfers and view details of completed transfers in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the "Activity" button, which is located on the left sidebar of the Globus interface. An email notification will also be sent once a transfer is complete.
